invariant: prepare_meeting returns an explicit empty preparation shell when the meeting exists but no attendee, entity, claim, or loop context exists.
pass_fail_definition: PASS = prepare_meeting returns no topics, context, loops, changes, or outcomes for meeting-meta-2-example.

fixture_design_notes.state_sql: Defines meeting and relationship tables, inserts one synthetic meeting, and intentionally leaves context tables empty.
fixture_design_notes.provider_replay: Pins an empty provider completion so the provider boundary cannot invent context.
fixture_design_notes.expected_output: Empty meeting preparation arrays with a meeting_has_zero_context reason.
fixture_design_notes.expected_provenance: No source or child composition because no claim-backed context exists.
